title: Totem of Unbinding
description: Armor with "Curse of Binding" will drop when a totem of undying is triggered.
body:
This mod will make it so whenever you trigger a totem of undying any equipped armor with "Curse of Binding" will be dropped as if you had died.

![Dropping armor with Curse of Binding when triggering Totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/910eb3047f071268661cc4df52363acf80c4c9f6.gif)

Works client-side for single player worlds, if installed server-side it will work for everybody without having it installed client-side.
